deep_dive.title: Spending Operators and Weak Power-Port Decompositions for Path-Dependent Entropic Lagrangians
deep_dive.abstract: History-dependent entropic formulations require a precise meaning for channelwise terminal variation and a spatial power split that remains valid for weak diffusion fields. This paper establishes both structures and places them in a single Path-Dependent Entropic Lagrangian construction. Endpoint calibration and cocycle additivity uniquely determine the oriented spending increment, while a channelwise extension of a decomposed power port yields explicit terminal differentials for scalar dissipation and potential-weighted fluxes. The diffusion split is formulated at Sobolev, finite-energy distributional, and bounded-variation/divergence-measure regularity. A natural-dual-space counterexample proves that chemical-potential-weighted residuals do not imply conservation, and an independent multiplier restores the unweighted balance. These ingredients are assembled in one augmented thermo-diffusion PDEL functional on a synchronized product space. Its admissible directional stationarity produces energetic and thermal conjugacy, species balance, flux closure, entropy production, and the two terminal power-routing channels. The same construction admits a finite-energy weak form and specializes to the Cahn--Hilliard equation.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: path-dependent entropic Lagrangian with endpoint calibration matches Schrodinger bridge formulation
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 路径依赖熵拉格朗日量结合端点校准，直接对应薛定谔桥问题
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 路径依赖熵拉格朗日量结合端点校准，直接对应薛定谔桥问题
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 路径依赖熵拉格朗日量结合端点校准，直接对应薛定谔桥问题
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Introduces a path-dependent entropic Lagrangian framework with endpoint calibration and diffusion split, providing a rigorous structure for Schrodinger bridge problems.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对历史依赖的熵公式需要精确的通道端点变分和空间功率分割的问题，提出了一种统一的路径依赖熵拉格朗日量构造。通过端点校准和上循环可加性唯一确定定向支出增量，并在多个正则性空间下制定了扩散分割。该方法为求解薛定谔桥问题提供了数学基础，尤其适用于弱扩散场下的端点约束控制。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文针对历史依赖的熵公式需要精确的通道端点变分和空间功率分割的问题，提出了一种统一的路径依赖熵拉格朗日量构造。通过端点校准和上循环可加性唯一确定定向支出增量，并在多个正则性空间下制定了扩散分割。该方法为求解薛定谔桥问题提供了数学基础，尤其适用于弱扩散场下的端点约束控制。
